_note: Phase 3 SFT (goal-only) checkpoint eval, full 100-episode protocol. Checkpoint = smolvla_sft_goal_run1 `last` at step 16000 (the 20k run was PREEMPTED on the A100 ~02:56 UTC right after the 16k checkpoint; `last` + training_state intact and resumable, but evaluated at 16k rather than 20k). Raw eval output on Drive: VLATune/sft/eval_smolvla_sft_goal_run1/eval_info.json (+ per-episode videos). Compare to baseline_libero_goal.json (85.0%).
policy: VLATune SFT: lerobot/smolvla_base fine-tuned on 428 libero_goal episodes (smolvla_sft_goal_run1, checkpoint=last @ step 16000)
hardware: Colab Pro+ L4 + High-RAM (eval); A100-80GB (SFT training)

stack.torch: 2.10.0+cu128 (fresh lerobot[smolvla,libero] install; pin via eval notebook Cell 1)

training.preemption_note: A100 runtime preempted ~02:56 UTC after saving checkpoint 016000; no 018000/020000. `last` and training_state (optimizer/scheduler/rng) intact -> resumable to 20k if desired.
training.dataset: HuggingFaceVLA/libero, 428 libero_goal episodes (episode_index filter; broken file_index worked around per docs/phase3_sft_runbook.md)

config.rename_map: {observation.images.image->camera1, observation.images.image2->camera2} (REQUIRED for our SFT checkpoint; baseline did NOT need it)

comparison_to_baseline.note: Goal-only SFT (16k steps) beats the official multi-suite checkpoint by +4.0 pts on LIBERO-Goal. Largest gain task 0 (+4: 6->10); small +/-1 jitter elsewhere. Both n=100; +4 pts is within binomial noise (95% CI ~+/-7 pts at n=100) but directionally consistent with goal-suite specialization. Headline for the project remains the Phase-4 SFT->RL delta on top of THIS checkpoint.

interpretation: Goal-only SFT of smolvla_base reaches 89.0% on LIBERO-Goal at step 16000 (target 20k, run preempted), vs 85.0% for the official baseline. Validates the full SFT pipeline end-to-end (camera rename_map, broken-dataset episode_index workaround, libero config preinit). No 0% task (floor 60%, task 9) rules out key-mismatch / control-mode failure modes. This checkpoint is the Phase-4 RL starting point.
wall_time_note: Eval 2.22 h (~80 s/episode) on L4 batch_size=4. SFT training ~2.2 h to step 16000 on A100 batch_size=64 before preemption.
